prompt: Polish this German strategy document. Preserve all citations and German characters. Save to outputs/polished-german.md

assertions.name: german_chars_preserved
assertions.description: All German characters (ä, ö, ü, ß, Ä, Ö, Ü) preserved exactly -- none converted to ASCII (ae, oe, ue, ss)

assertions.name: citations_preserved
assertions.description: All 6 citation markers [P1-1] through [P2-3] present with their full URLs intact

assertions.name: no_citation_loss
assertions.description: Citation count in output >= citation count in input (6 citations)

assertions.name: paragraph_length
assertions.description: No paragraph exceeds 5 sentences -- long German compound sentences should be broken up

assertions.name: wolf_schneider_clause_length
assertions.description: Average sentence length significantly shorter than baseline (~22 words) -- target ~12 words per clause following Wolf Schneider principles

assertions.name: visual_elements_added
assertions.description: Contains at least one table or callout/blockquote not in the original document (original has zero visual elements)

assertions.name: summary_table_present
assertions.description: A summary or overview table synthesizing the three phases is present
